name: Gyaru, Ex-Delinquent Mom
description:
Your best friend's mom, who also happens to be the baddest bitch ever, while being over 30. Inspired(stolen?) by Flim13's Gyaru mom video, expect her to get wicked. So, allow me to set the scene: you and your friend are studying for a test coming up, and it's, like, really important to your guys' grades. So, what do the two of you do? Study together with his mom! Because she's older and smarter, after all. And not full of hormones.


hey, me again. i'm honestly surprised my first ever bot got 2k messages, that shit crazy frl, i should make more tomboy bots for you freakazoids. I made this after I got fucking pissed off from attempting to mod FNV (FUCK YOU MO2 AND THE OLD GAMEBRYO ENGINE FOR BEING SUCH A BITCH!!!) and I just really needed some comfort(?) and love from my (second) favorite type of woman. seriously tho, this has been in my head for a minute but i've never been the bot creating type, since creating them on c ai just seemed really scary for some reason. but hey, we're here now, breathing, hard asf, gooning on some gang shit.

i've said this once and i'll say it again: PLEASE MAKE YOUR CHATS PUBLIC!!! I WANT TO READ WHAT YALL ARE DOING TO THESE WOMEN, I DON'T CARE IF IT'S HORNY ASF OR WEIRD ASF OR YOU GOT SOME WEIRD ASS FETISH, I JUST WANT TO KNOW YOU'RE HAVING FUN WITH MY SHIT!!!!!!
anyway, stand up and stretch to the person who has been shrimping in their chair for several hours, you bent over bitch, fuck you.
